name: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc.
sic_description: Industrial & Commercial Fans & Blowers & Air Purifing Equip
headquarters: Not specified (operations in Rolling Meadows, IL; New Iberia
summary: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. (PPIH) engineers, designs, manufactures, and sells specialty piping systems and leak detection systems. Products include insulated district heating and cooling piping, primary and secondary containment systems for hazardous fluids, oil and gas pipeline coatings and insulation, and anti-corrosion coatings. The company serves industrial and government customers across North America, the Middle East, India, and Egypt, operating in one reportable segment: Piping Systems.
